query: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM leadEvents WHERE reason LIKE '%йҳҝеҙ‘%'; SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM vehicles WHERE description LIKE '%йҳҝеҙ‘%' OR title LIKE '%йҳҝеҙ‘%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user fb6ZvqfLuJXoq6N.546e92496cc7 --database YQVYVFB6KqQhPVgwGtGztr --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM leadEvents WHERE reason LIKE '%йҳҝеҙ‘%'; SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM vehicles WHERE description LIKE '%йҳҝеҙ‘%' OR title LIKE '%йҳҝеҙ‘%';
